footer.tagline: At ICA Languages you don't just learn a language, you learn to use it. Apizaco, Tlaxcala.

home.heroSubtitle: Practical classes, small groups and conversational focus.
home.certText: At ICA Languages, your preparation has international backing. Achieve your goals with official certifications from recognized institutions like Cambridge and the Alliance Française. Our commitment is that your effort has real value, valid nationally and internationally.
home.courseInglesDesc: Dynamic classes, well-structured levels and communicative focus. Learn to express yourself confidently in English.
home.courseFrancesDesc: Connect with French culture while learning the language in a practical and fun way.
home.courseEmpresaDesc: Linguistic training for work teams. Content tailored to your business sector and professional goals.
home.demoText: Discover our methodology and resolve all your doubts. Book a free demo class and experience ICA Languages. We give you the tools, you take the first step.
home.whySubtitle: At ICA Languages you don't just learn a language, you learn to use it. We focus on practical, close and effective teaching, with trained teachers and an environment that motivates growth.
home.testimonialsSubtitle: Real stories of people who transformed their lives by learning a language.
home.t1: I signed up for the English course and I'm really enjoying it. The teacher is very well prepared and explains everything superbly. Excellent service!
home.t2: I took a certification preparation course, learned a lot and got a high score.
home.t3: I'm in the French course and they teach very well. I highly recommend the school.
home.t4: I joined the TOEFL prep course because I needed it for university and I liked their teaching method so much that I continued with the regular English course.
home.t5: My son has been here for 8 months and his progress is incredible. He learns through play and always wants to go to class.
home.aptisSubtitle: The British Council English certification: flexible, fast, and internationally recognized.
home.aptisR1Desc: Forget rigid exams. APTIS offers a modern, agile format that assesses your real communication skills in record time.
home.aptisR2Desc: Get your results efficiently. You'll know your official level (A1-C2) in a short time.
home.aptisR3Desc: One of the best value-for-money certifications on the market, letting you prove your skills without a disproportionate investment.
home.aptisBannerTitle: Get certified with APTIS at ICA Languages!
home.aptisBannerText: Specialized preparation with British Council. Limited spots.

nosotros.subtitle: ICA Languages
nosotros.description: We specialize in language teaching in Tlaxcala. We believe in the power of language education to open doors. Our team consists of expert teachers committed to your progress.
nosotros.enfoqueText: Linguistic immersion and active learning, ensuring that our students not only master a new language, but also develop key cultural and communicative skills.
nosotros.misionText: Our mission is to empower individuals from everywhere to acquire proficiency in foreign languages and explore global opportunities. We are committed to providing high-quality language education, fostering intercultural communication and providing internationally recognized certifications that support the personal and professional growth of our students.
nosotros.visionText: As leaders in language education, we aspire to be a benchmark in the teaching and certification of foreign languages at a global level. We envision a world in which language learning is a bridge that connects cultures, driving collaboration and understanding between people from different backgrounds. Through our certifications, we seek to enable our students to achieve their goals in an increasingly interconnected environment.
nosotros.valor1Desc: We strive to achieve the highest standards in everything we do.
nosotros.valor2Desc: We implement modern methods and tools to ensure relevant and dynamic learning.
nosotros.valor3Desc: We are dedicated to the success of our students, accompanying them at every step of their learning.
nosotros.valor4Desc: We celebrate cultural and linguistic richness, promoting an inclusive and respectful environment.
nosotros.valor5Desc: We act with transparency and ethics, prioritizing the well-being and trust of our educational community.
nosotros.ctaJoin: Want to be part of our team?
nosotros.ctaJoinSub: We are looking for teachers passionate about languages and education.

cursoIngles.subtitle: Learn English from scratch or improve your level with dynamic, practical classes focused on real communication.
cursoIngles.r1: English remains the most widely used language in the academic, professional and digital world.
cursoIngles.r2: Mastering it opens doors to better jobs, international studies and enriching personal experiences.
cursoIngles.r3: At ICA Languages we help you achieve it with classes adapted to your needs and level.
cursoIngles.modalitySubtitle: Learn in the way that best fits your life. Both modalities have the same quality of teaching.
cursoIngles.presencialDesc: Learn at our facilities with an environment designed for concentration and active learning. Interact face to face with your teacher and classmates.
cursoIngles.onlineDesc: Study from anywhere with the same quality of teaching. Live classes via video call with personalized follow-up and digital material.

cursoFrances.description: At ICA Languages we offer French classes designed to help you develop real skills in the language. Practical, dynamic and focused on communicating with confidence, from scratch or with prior knowledge.
cursoFrances.why1: Trained teachers with experience teaching the language.
cursoFrances.why2: Classes focused on conversation and comprehension.

cursoNinos.description: At ICA Languages we have English courses for children, designed to learn while playing, speak with confidence and develop lifelong skills.
cursoNinos.whyTitle: Why choose us for their learning?
cursoNinos.whySubtitle: At ICA we make sure your children learn with joy, confidence and real results.
cursoNinos.w1Desc: Learning through play, songs and activities that keep children motivated.
cursoNinos.w2Title: Teachers experienced in early childhood education
cursoNinos.w2Desc: Our teachers are trained to guide children with patience and creativity.
cursoNinos.w3Title: Communicative approach adapted to their age
cursoNinos.w3Desc: Content designed for each developmental stage, with relevant vocabulary and topics.
cursoNinos.a1Desc: Groups organized by age range for more effective and natural learning.
cursoNinos.a2Desc: Complements school English subjects with real practice and confidence.
cursoNinos.a3Desc: From the start we develop clear pronunciation and a solid vocabulary.
cursoNinos.benefitsTitle: What your child achieves by learning English today
cursoNinos.b1Desc: Children who learn a second language from a young age develop superior communicative skills.
cursoNinos.b2Desc: Active methodology that encourages children to express themselves fearlessly from the first class.
cursoNinos.b3Desc: Investing in English from childhood opens doors to better opportunities in their academic and professional future.

cursoEmpresa.description: At ICA Languages we offer English classes focused on strengthening professional communication within your company. We adapt to the needs and schedules of each organization to provide a practical, flexible and effective experience.
cursoEmpresa.whySubtitle: Flexible, dynamic courses adapted to your organization's objectives.
cursoEmpresa.w5: Small groups that facilitate active participation
cursoEmpresa.w6: Session planning according to each area's objectives
cursoEmpresa.a1: Companies that want to train their staff in functional English.
cursoEmpresa.a2: Teams that communicate with international clients or suppliers.
cursoEmpresa.a3: Leaders or executives who require a more technical or advanced level.
cursoEmpresa.a5: Entrepreneurs and SMEs who want to internationalize.
cursoEmpresa.ctaBtn: Get a quote for my company on WhatsApp

certCambridge.description: At ICA Languages we prepare you to obtain an official Cambridge Certification, recognized worldwide by universities, companies and institutions. We have experience in preparing and supporting students to take their exams with confidence and security.
certCambridge.why1: It is a valid document at international level.
certCambridge.why2: Increases your academic and professional opportunities.
certCambridge.why3: Allows you to measure your progress officially.
certCambridge.why6: Improves your resume and professional profile.
certCambridge.certsTitle: Cambridge Certifications available at ICA Languages
certCambridge.certsSubtitle: At ICA Languages we offer and prepare you to obtain an official international certification. Learn about the available exams and choose the one ideal for your academic or professional profile.
certCambridge.ketDesc: The KET certification is an elementary exam that assesses the ability to understand and use everyday phrases, as well as express oneself in simple situations. It is ideal for those starting their language journey.
certCambridge.petDesc: This exam measures the use of English in common work, school and social contexts. It demonstrates that the student can communicate in practical and real situations, such as writing simple emails or holding basic conversations.
certCambridge.fceDesc: The FCE certification certifies that the student can use English effectively in both professional and academic environments. It includes comprehension of complex texts, writing reports or essays, and participation in detailed conversations.
certCambridge.caeDesc: An advanced level demonstrating fluency and precision in the language. Ideal for university studies, professional work abroad, or applying for scholarships and exchanges. Recognized by prestigious academic institutions.
certCambridge.tktDesc: TKT is a certification for English teachers. It evaluates knowledge about language teaching. Ideal for those looking to start or strengthen their career as English teachers.
certCambridge.ieltsDesc: IELTS is one of the most widely accepted exams worldwide for study, migration or work. It measures listening, reading, writing and speaking skills. Two versions: Academic — for university or postgraduate studies. General Training — for migration or professional purposes.

certAlianza.mcerTitle: Recognized internationally and aligned with the CEFR (Common European Framework of Reference for Languages)
certAlianza.description: At ICA Languages we prepare you to take the official French certifications issued by the Alliance Française, which validate your level according to the Common European Framework of Reference for Languages (CEFR).
certAlianza.why2: Valid for universities and immigration procedures
certAlianza.why3: Improves your academic and professional profile
certAlianza.why4: They do not have an expiration date
certAlianza.delfTitle: DELF – Diplôme d'Études en Langue Française
certAlianza.delfDesc: The DELF assesses your ability to use French in real everyday situations (work, school, travel, social relationships). It is ideal for students, adults or professionals who want to formally accredit their level.
certAlianza.dalfTitle: DALF – Diplôme Approfondi de Langue Française
certAlianza.dalfDesc: The DALF accredits an advanced mastery of the French language, both written and oral. It is ideal for higher education, migration or professional work in French-speaking countries.
certAlianza.delfA1Desc: The DELF A1 certification assesses basic comprehension and expression in French. The candidate should be able to introduce themselves, ask simple questions and maintain a brief interaction on everyday topics.
certAlianza.delfA2Desc: This level certifies the ability to communicate in simple everyday situations such as shopping, introducing oneself, talking about family, interests or surroundings.
certAlianza.delfB1Desc: The B1 exam certifies that the student can get by when travelling, write simple texts, express opinions and understand general messages in everyday situations.
certAlianza.delfB2Desc: This level validates that the student can argue, defend opinions, understand complex texts and actively participate in discussions. It is accepted by French and francophone universities for academic admission.
certAlianza.dalfC1Desc: Advanced certification assessing fluency, precision, deep text comprehension and the ability to express oneself in a structured way in academic or professional contexts.
certAlianza.dalfC2Desc: The highest recognition in the French language. Validates near-native competence with complete comprehension of oral and written texts, and absolute mastery of the language in specialized contexts.

certConstancia.mcerTitle: Useful for graduation, calls and academic procedures
certConstancia.description: At ICA Languages we also help you obtain official certificates that validate your English level for administrative, university or professional purposes, such as graduation procedures or job applications.
certConstancia.cenniDesc: This certificate accredits the level of mastery of the English language according to the Common European Framework of Reference (CEFR). It is useful for labor, academic and official procedures within Mexico.
certConstancia.tituloDesc: If you need to prove your English level for university graduation purposes, you can obtain a certificate based on a formal diagnostic evaluation. It is a document accepted by many Mexican universities to fulfill the foreign language requirement.

certAptis.description: APTIS is the British Council English certification. At ICA Languages we prepare you to obtain your official level (A1-C2) with a flexible, modern format recognized in over 100 countries.
certAptis.r1Desc: Forget rigid exams. APTIS offers a modern, agile format that assesses your real communication skills in record time.
certAptis.r2Desc: Get your results efficiently. You'll know your official level (A1-C2) in a short time.
certAptis.r3Desc: One of the best value-for-money certifications on the market, letting you prove your skills without a disproportionate investment.
certAptis.b1: Officially certify your English level for institutions and companies.
certAptis.b2: Recognized by universities, embassies, and international companies.
certAptis.b3: Evaluates 4 skills: grammar, listening, reading and writing.
certAptis.b4: Available in digital format, speeding up results.
certAptis.b5: Valid for graduation, scholarships and immigration processes.
certAptis.b6: Aligned to the Common European Framework of Reference (CEFR) A1-C2.
certAptis.aboutText: APTIS evaluates four core language skills: grammar and vocabulary, listening comprehension, reading and writing. You can choose the speaking module to also certify your oral level. Results are issued on the A1 to C2 European scale.
certAptis.ctaTitle: Ready to get certified with APTIS?
certAptis.ctaSubtitle: Contact us and receive free guidance on the certification process.

uneteAlEquipo.subtitle: Explore our teacher vacancies
uneteAlEquipo.description: At ICA Languages, we value passion for teaching and continuous growth. Join a vibrant community dedicated to connecting the world through languages.
uneteAlEquipo.ubicacionPresencial: 412 Juarez Ave, Centro, 90300 Cdad. de Apizaco, Tlax.
